SCENARIO MODE
-------------
This section is scenario planning only. It is NOT a fixed forward projection.

Scenario        Monthly Assumption   12-Month Capital   Interpretation
--------------  -------------------  -----------------  ------------------------------
Stress                      -2.00%           44259.82  Weak run persists / further degradation
Base                         0.00%           56402.29  Capital preservation, no growth assumption
Recovery                     1.00%           63555.51  Partial stabilization after execution improvements

OPERATOR GUIDANCE
-----------------
1) Treat this run as unstable for institutional projection purposes.
2) Prioritize Wave B signal ranking and top-N execution before trusting growth narratives.
3) Require better breadth across strategies and SYMBOL::TF edges before restoring optimistic scenario assumptions.
4) Use A84_05, A84_07, and A84_08 as the primary reality checks before any growth claim.

------------------------------------------------------------
A84_06 — CHATGPT UPLOAD (COMPACT)
------------------------------------------------------------
================================
Run Timestamp (UTC) : 2026-04-15 14:03:50

------------------------------------------------------------
TQGA — ARCHITECTURE STATE (Institutional Mode)
------------------------------------------------------------
---------------------------------------------
• Market grid: Top20 symbols × 3 TF (1h, 4h, 1d) => 60 markets.
• Backtest: Strategy × Market grid; captures StrategyPnL, SymbolPnL, Symbol×TF PnL, Strategy×Symbol×TF PnL.
• CIO: ranks markets by PnL score (per Symbol×TF) then allocates with caps (per-market + per-symbol).
• Fitness gating: kills dead strategies (0 trades / low PnL / fitness<=0) before CIO recompute.

RUN SCOPE
---------
Strategies Selected : 1
  S01  EmaTrendQuantStrategy

------------------

Allowed Strategies: NONE

REALISM / SURVIVAL CHECKLIST (minimum)
--------------------------------------
• Walk-forward: split history into sequential windows; tune on train, validate on next window only.
• Friction: add fees + slippage + spread; stress with 2× and 4× friction multipliers.
• Regime robustness: require stable performance across multiple regime buckets (trend/range/volatile).
• Risk limits: max exposure per symbol, max drawdown stop, and kill-switch for degraded fitness.
• No-leakage: indicators must use only past candles; avoid using final equity to pick parameters.

WHAT TO UPLOAD TO CHATGPT
-------------------------
1) This file (A84_06_CHATGPT_UPLOAD)
2) A84_00 Executive Summary
3) A84_05 Strategy Fitness + CIO Gating
4) REPORT_11 Symbol×TF PnL and REPORT_12 CIO weights

   9 | JUPUSDT::1d               |       0.00
  10 | PEPEUSDT::1h              |       0.00

S05 FAILURE HYPOTHESIS
----------------------
The dominant sleeve is too important and the portfolio weakens late. Investigate S05 durability before expanding confidence.

OPERATOR GUIDANCE
-----------------
1) If S05 dependency is extreme and late-half return is weaker, treat this as durability failure, not a pure breadth problem.
2) Do not add many new strategy families before isolating why S05 weakened.
3) Inspect whether UNIUSDT::4h and RNDRUSDT::4h remain the only monetized S05 cluster.
4) Prefer targeted S05 durability research over broad architecture changes.


======================================================================
